parameters.query:
SELECT 
     jo.joborder_id, 
     jo.joborder_number, 
     jo.joborder_type, 
     jo.order_number, 
     jo.phase, 
     jo.status, 
     jo.createtime, 
     jo.product_quantity, 
     jo.printinfobox_id,
     jo.printinfo_second_id,              -- 新增：第二打印信息ID
     u.user_name AS user_name, 
     p1.print_name AS printinfo_name, 
     p2.print_name AS printinfobox_name, 
     p3.print_name AS printinfo_second_name, -- 新增：第二打印信息名称
     pinfo2.product_code, 
     pinfo2.product_model_id, 
     pl.procedure_list_name, 
     jo.printinfo_id, 
     jo.product_id, 
     jo.procedure_list_id, 
     COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_count 
 FROM 
     mes.joborder jo 
 LEFT JOIN 
     mes.sys_user u ON jo.user_id = u.user_id 
 LEFT JOIN 
     mes.printinfo p1 ON jo.printinfo_id = p1.printinfo_id 
 LEFT JOIN 
     mes.printinfo p2 ON jo.printinfobox_id = p2.printinfo_id 
 LEFT JOIN 
     mes.printinfo p3 ON jo.printinfo_second_id = p3.printinfo_id  -- 新增：关联第二打印信息
 LEFT JOIN 
     mes.product_info pinfo2 ON jo.product_id = pinfo2.product_id 
 LEFT JOIN 
     mes.procedure_list pl ON jo.procedure_list_id = pl.procedure_list_id 
 WHERE 
     jo.status = '1' 
 and jo.joborder_number ='{{ $('Webhook').item.json.query.joborder_number }}' 
 -- order by pinfo2.product_model_id ASC, jo.createtime DESC 
 order by jo.createtime DESC 
 -- order by pinfo2.product_model_id 
 limit {{$json.pageSize}} OFFSET {{ $json.offset }};

SELECT 
     jo.joborder_id, 
     jo.joborder_number, 
     jo.joborder_type, 
     jo.order_number, 
     jo.phase, 
     jo.status, 
     jo.createtime, 
     jo.product_quantity, 
     jo.printinfobox_id, 
     jo.printinfo_second_id,                  -- [新增] 第二打印信息ID
     u.user_name AS user_name, 
     p1.print_name AS printinfo_name, 
     p2.print_name AS printinfobox_name, 
     p3.print_name AS printinfo_second_name,  -- [新增] 第二打印信息名称
     pinfo2.product_code, 
     pinfo2.product_model_id, 
     pl.procedure_list_name, 
     jo.printinfo_id, 
     jo.product_id, 
     jo.procedure_list_id, 
     COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_count 
 FROM 
     mes.joborder jo 
 LEFT JOIN 
     mes.sys_user u ON jo.user_id = u.user_id 
 LEFT JOIN 
     mes.printinfo p1 ON jo.printinfo_id = p1.printinfo_id 
 LEFT JOIN 
     mes.printinfo p2 ON jo.printinfobox_id = p2.printinfo_id 
 LEFT JOIN 
     mes.printinfo p3 ON jo.printinfo_second_id = p3.printinfo_id -- [新增] 关联第二打印信息，使用 LEFT JOIN 处理空值
 LEFT JOIN 
     mes.product_info pinfo2 ON jo.product_id = pinfo2.product_id 
 LEFT JOIN 
     mes.procedure_list pl ON jo.procedure_list_id = pl.procedure_list_id 
 WHERE 
      jo.status = '1' 
 -- order by pinfo2.product_model_id ASC, jo.createtime DESC 
 order by jo.createtime DESC 
 -- order by pinfo2.product_model_id 
 limit {{$json.pageSize}} OFFSET {{ $json.offset }};
